payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of this general ledger and are not intended for use in the preparation of financial statements.
payload.description: Financial results are preliminary and subject to audit review; actuals do not include post-close adjustments.

payload.gap_text: Actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: Current month actuals exclude post-close adjustments.
Stated figures may have rounding differences.

tool_args.label: Steven Weiss Financial Liaison for Metro-North
Metro-North has subsidy arrangement with NJ Transit

payload.claim_text: The primary drivers of favorable expense variance include the timing of capital expenditures partially offset by higher health and welfare costs and lower reimbursable overhead.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: April YTD non-reimbursable operating results were unfavorable to the Budget by $21.6 million or 3.7%. Non-reimbursable revenues through April were $11.7 million unfavorable to the Budget due to the timing of receiving Metro-North's portion of ARPA partially offset by higher ridership revenue. Total non-reimbursable expenses were $14.7 million unfavorable primarily due to higher health and welfare costs, lower reimbursable overhead, and higher materials expenses.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $12.2 million favorable to the Budget due to increased ridership volumes across all East of Hudson lines.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: The vacancies are primarily in the Operational Hourlies category followed by the Professional/Technical/Clerical and then Managers/Supervisors categories.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators reflect MTA-wide adopted calculations that exclude non-cash liability adjustments. Adjusted indicators have been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR including: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB retiree expenses, and Inclusion of estimated farebox revenue from an equalization of the Connecticut fare structure.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad
